training_status: light activity, walks a few miles a week

benefits.description: Lost 65 lbs over approximately 4.5 months, starting weight near 400 lbs, current weight 315 lbs
Sleeps like a baby, no negative change in sleep duration
Heart rate lowered slightly, attributed partially to reduced cardiac strain from weight loss

protocol_notes: OP is self-employed with irregular hours. Tracks weight using Shotsy app. Pays attention to diet alongside walking a few miles per week. Describes Reta as 'doing most the heavy lifting'. Wife is also on Reta at a higher dose.
